name: Single-Source Restriction
description: Purchases over $25,000 in any category where an active contract already exists must use the contracted vendor. A request for a different vendor in that category is a policy violation.

name: Manager Approval Threshold
description: Purchases between $10,000 and $49,999 require manager approval before processing. Requests in this range submitted without documented manager approval are non-compliant.

name: Director Approval Threshold
description: Purchases of $50,000 and above require director-level approval. Requests in this range submitted without documented director approval are non-compliant and must be escalated.

name: Prohibited Category — Catering
description: Catering and food service purchases are prohibited under the current corporate spend reduction initiative effective Q4 2025. All catering requests must be denied regardless of amount.

name: Expired Contract Vendor
description: Purchases from a vendor whose contract has expired may not proceed until the contract is renewed or a new vendor is selected. Requests referencing an expired-contract vendor must be denied.

name: Compliance-Flagged Vendor Hold
description: Purchases from any vendor with an active compliance flag must be escalated for review by the Legal and Compliance team before approval. No purchase from a flagged vendor may be approved directly.

name: Staffing Vendor Single-Source
description: All contingent staffing engagements must go through the enterprise staffing contract. Direct engagement of non-contracted staffing firms is prohibited for engagements exceeding 40 hours.

name: Budget Overage Prohibition
description: No purchase request may be approved if it would cause the cost center's quarterly spend to exceed its approved quarterly budget. Requests that would exceed the remaining budget must be denied.
